params.name: Portrait of Helena
params.description:
On Apr 18, 1625 AD, Rubens presented this portrait to his wife's sister.
This oil painting was made by Peter Paul Rubens for his wife's sister. The composition of this painting contains meandering, yet graceful and smooth lines with strong color contrast. His portraits have an informal and engaging charm. Four years after the death of his first wife, at the age of 53, Rubens married 16-year-old Helena who served as his model many times. This painting was gifted to Helena's sister.
